close_reason: Added RoutesSuite covering all endpoints (happy/sad/edge) + fixed POST /check to return JSON 400 on malformed body. 13 tests green.
description: Only UsernameChecker pure logic is covered. Add http4s route tests for GET /api/v1/check/{username} (hit + miss + empty->400), POST /api/v1/check (batch, over-limit->400, empty value->400, malformed JSON->400), GET /api/v1/meta, and 404 for unknown routes. Covers happy/sad/edge paths per verify conventions.
title: Add route-level HTTP tests for API endpoints

description: Once a Dockerfile and CI workflow exist, extend the Makefile with honest docker-build/docker-run and a ci target. Deliberately deferred until there is something real behind them (YAGNI).
title: Add make docker-* and ci targets

close_reason: Ran make fmt on the 2 remaining files; make check now fully clean.
description: make fmt-check flags AppConfig.scala and UsernameDataset.scala as unformatted against .scalafmt.conf. Run 'make fmt' and commit. (Routes.scala was already reformatted as part of bad_usernames_api-0u3.) Quick, isolated cleanup.
title: Fix scalafmt formatting drift in 2 source files

description: Milestone 3. docker/README.md is a stub. Decide packaging (sbt-native-packager vs assembly JAR), add a Dockerfile that builds a runnable image honouring the BAD_USERNAMES_* env config. Foundation for compose docs and make docker targets.
title: Add production Dockerfile

description:
Use CircleCI (house default across the letterbox fleet; GH Actions only on the 2 newest repos, gauge + sortingoffice). Base on letterbox-scoring/.circleci/config.yml but trim to a single 'build' job for this repo's current scope:
- image: sbtscala/scala-sbt:eclipse-temurin-* matching sbt 1.10.7 / Scala 3.5.2 (their pin is 1.10.11/3.3.6)
- restore/save sbt cache keyed on build.sbt + .circleci/config.yml + project/build.properties + project/plugins.sbt (paths ~/.m2 ~/.ivy2/cache ~/.sbt)
- steps: checkout; run 'make check' via 'cat /dev/null | sbt scalafmtCheckAll test'; store_test_results from target/test-reports
- slack/notify on fail (optional, needs slack-secrets context)
Do NOT copy their test-integration/test-contracts jobs (no such tests here yet - see bad_usernames_api-0u3) or build-image/publish-image GCR jobs (belongs with Dockerfile bead bad_usernames_api-7he). Reference: gh api repos/flurdy/letterbox-scoring/contents/.circleci/config.yml
title: Add CircleCI CI workflow

description: Milestone 3. After the Dockerfile exists, add example docker run / compose config with a mounted dataset file, and document env configuration for self-hosters. Flesh out docker/README.md.
title: Add docker-compose and self-hosting docs

description: Milestone 2. Currently uses dev/sample-bad-usernames.json only. Decide consumption approach (submodule / vendored snapshot / build-time fetch / mounted file per docs/dataset.md), preserve upstream CC0 license info, and surface the real dataset version or commit in GET /api/v1/meta (datasetVersion).
title: Integrate real flurdy/bad_usernames dataset and expose version in /meta
